ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population estimate entry */,
  "race_origin" TEXT /* Race or Hispanic origin category */,
  "population_number" INTEGER /* Estimated population number for the category in the specified area */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank based on population size within the county */,
  "county_pct_distribution" REAL /* Percentage distribution of the population in the county */,
  "state_pct_distribution" REAL /* Percentage distribution of the population in the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population estimate was calculated */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the estimate */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_state_pct_distribution FOREIGN KEY ("state_pct_distribution") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_race_origin FOREIGN KEY ("race_origin") REFERENCES racial_categories ("race_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_county_pct_distribution FOREIGN KEY ("county_pct_distribution") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the state the county belongs to */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "racial_categories" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the racial category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category for the racial category (e.g., Asian -> East Asian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, public health official, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES demographic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_demographics" (
  "county_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county associated with the demographic data */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial category */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of the population within the racial category in the county */,
  "percent_distribution" REAL /* Percentage distribution of the racial category in the county */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_demographics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES racial_categories ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_demographics" (
  "state_demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state demographic entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state associated with the demographic data */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racial category */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of the population within the racial category in the state */,
  "percent_distribution" REAL /* Percentage distribution of the racial category in the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population in the state */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_demographics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES racial_categories ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES demographic_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the report category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" TEXT /* Parent category for the report category (e.g., Health -> Health Trends) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_session_logs" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_session_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
